security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.anthropic.com

bundle.shortDescription: The AI-native workspace where humans and AI teammates ship in the same room.
bundle.longDescription: Altr is a Mac-native workspace where humans and four named AI teammates — Pax, Eng, Dex, Rae — collaborate on the same artifacts. v0.1 ships the Pax + Eng loop: idea → spec → tickets → PRs.
